parameters.name: list_posts
parameters.description: List WordPress posts. Optional filters: search (keyword), status (publish/draft/pending/private), per_page (default 10, max 100), page (pagination).

value.status: ={{ $fromAI('status', 'Filter by status: publish, draft, pending, private (optional)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: get_post
parameters.description: Get a single WordPress post by ID (full content, status, author, categories, tags).

parameters.name: create_post
parameters.description: Create a new WordPress post. Default status is 'draft'. Categories/tags are comma-separated lists of IDs (use list_categories/list_tags to find IDs). Content accepts HTML.

parameters.name: update_post
parameters.description: Update a WordPress post (provide only fields you want to change). Use status='publish' to publish a draft.

parameters.name: delete_post
parameters.description: Delete a post. Without force it goes to trash (recoverable). With force=true it's permanently deleted.

value.force: ={{ $fromAI('force', 'Set to true for permanent delete (default: trash)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_pages
parameters.description: List WordPress pages (static pages like About, Contact, Imprint). Optional: search, status, per_page.

parameters.name: get_page
parameters.description: Get a single WordPress page by ID (full content, parent).

parameters.name: create_page
parameters.description: Create a new WordPress page. Default status is 'draft'. Optional parent (another page ID) for hierarchy.

parameters.name: update_page
parameters.description: Update a WordPress page (only provided fields are changed).

parameters.name: delete_page
parameters.description: Delete a page (trash by default, force=true for permanent).

parameters.name: list_comments
parameters.description: List comments. Optional: post (filter by post ID), status (approve/hold/spam/trash), per_page.

parameters.name: moderate_comment
parameters.description: Change a comment's moderation status. Status values: approved (or approve), hold (pending), spam, trash.

value.status: ={{ $fromAI('status', 'New status: approved, hold, spam, or trash', 'string') }}

parameters.name: list_categories
parameters.description: List post categories with their IDs and post counts.

parameters.name: create_category
parameters.description: Create a new post category. Required: name. Optional: description, parent (for hierarchy), slug.

parameters.name: list_tags
parameters.description: List post tags with their IDs and post counts.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Cross-type search across posts, pages, and other content. Returns ID, type, title, and URL of each match.

parameters.name: list_media
parameters.description: List Media Library items (images, videos, audio, documents). Optional: search, media_type (image/video/audio/application).

parameters.name: upload_media
parameters.description: Upload a file from a user-sent file (File Bridge) to the WordPress Media Library. Required: file_ref (the ID from the user's message, e.g. file-abc12345). Optional: title, alt_text, caption, filename (custom name).
